Arcade dApp→dApp navigation spike (SPEC §2.3 #1)

Tap each button inside the Polkadot host. For each, note what happens: opens in-host as a new dApp / replaces this dApp / opens external browser / nothing. Target app: rockpaperscissors.dot.

A <a href="https://rockpaperscissors.dot.li"> (same frame) B <a target="_blank"> gateway URL C <a href="https://rockpaperscissors.dot"> (bare .dot host)
